log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13

→ melee_spell attack: [d20:15+3=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 7casting_mod force damage. Fairy — Iron Concentration HP: NaN/67

→ Fairy — Iron Concentration: DEX save [d20:3+7=10 vs DC 11] FAIL! 3 radiant damage. HP: NaN/67
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Fairy — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14

→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):15+1=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):12+1=13 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)

→ Mage: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 3/5 targets affected.
